notes: Gate 1 foundation slice completed. Low-precision primitive metadata now carries provider-derived source/product/accumulator/result SEW/LMUL, tail policy, mask policy, runtime control plan, and runtime AVL source under tcrv_rvv.low_precision_primitive.*; target support-bundle export mirrors those fields; target artifact validation rejects stale primitive typed-config/runtime mirrors. Focused signed i8 and unsigned u8 product-reduction lit tests pass, with stale runtime AVL source and stale tail policy rejection. Macro task remains open for Gate 2 selected-body realization from the primitive surface, Gate 3 route/artifact carry-through beyond this foundation, and Gate 4 fresh source-backed same-target evidence/admission if later claimed.
